mergeSummary: Kept the quality/performance source tree as base.
Added dynamic adapter/router modules and docs from dynamic-router archive.
Merged HTTP /mcp dynamic tools/list, prompts/resources, projected upstream calls, upstream_call, and tool result shaping into the quality dashboard runtime.
Kept resource limits, health/overview cache, worker pool, telemetry, and sharded upstream session pools from the quality archive.
